Here is the list of zodiac signs and their corresponding scores on the $LINE scale, along with a brief description:
1. Aries - 8 - Adventurous and impulsive, Aries tend to be unpredictable and prone to making rash decisions.
2. Taurus - 7 - Reliable and practical, Tauruses are steady and consistent, but can also be stubborn and resistant to change.
3. Gemini - 9 - Quick-witted and adaptable, Geminis are always on the go and thrive in new situations, but may struggle with focus and commitment.
4. Cancer - 6 - Emotional and nurturing, Cancers are deeply caring and protective of their loved ones, but can be moody and overly sensitive to criticism.
5. Leo - 9 - Confident and charismatic, Leos are natural-born leaders who shine brightly in the spotlight, but may struggle with humility and modesty.
6. Virgo - 7 - Analytical and practical, Virgos are detail-oriented and hardworking, but can be perfectionistic and critical of themselves and others.
7. Libra - 8 - Diplomatic and social, Librans are charming and gracious, but may struggle with indecision and a desire to please everyone.
8. Scorpio - 10 - Passionate and intense, Scorpions are deeply emotional and perceptive, but can be secretive and controlling in their relationships.
9. Sagittarius - 9 - Adventurous and optimistic, Sagittarians are always looking to the future and seeking new experiences, but may struggle with impulsivity and a lack of follow-through.
10. Capricorn - 7 - Ambitious and responsible, Capricorns are driven and disciplined, but can be overly serious and rigid in their approach to life.
11. Aquarius - 8 - Humanitarian and independent, Aquarians are innovative and forward-thinking, but may struggle with emotional detachment and a tendency to dismiss the feelings of others.
12. Pisces - 5 - Imaginative and empathetic, Pisces are compassionate and sensitive, but can be dreamy and unrealistic in their expectations of themselves and others.
Note: The $LINE scale is not an officially recognized system, and scores may vary depending on the source or interpretation.
